hero.name: Abdullah V. Çoşkun.
hero.intro: From Next.js to the backend, from automation flows to AI integration — I build it end to end.

about.heading: About
about.p1: I turn business processes into software. I build web applications, dashboards, automation flows and AI-powered tools.
about.p2_post: — systematizing repetitive work, making data visible.
about.p3: From interface to backend, from API integration to deployment, I build the whole system end to end.
about.p4: I work in Turkish, German and English. I focus on digital projects in Turkey and the DACH region.

web_applications.title: Web Applications
web_applications.body: End-to-end web applications and products, from Next.js to the backend.

operational_dashboards.title: Monitoring & Analytics
operational_dashboards.body: Real-time metric panels, status monitoring and observability tools.

ai_products.title: AI-Powered Products
ai_products.body: Smart content generation, data extraction and recommendation engines — AI layers integrated into your product.

workflow_automation.title: Workflow Automation
workflow_automation.body: Automation systems that turn repetitive business processes into trigger-based flows.

internal_platforms.title: Internal Platforms
internal_platforms.body: Internal tools, CRUD systems and admin panels where your teams run daily operations.

client_systems.title: Client Systems
client_systems.body: CRM flows and portal systems that run end to end, from client intake to follow-up.

isbn-resale-automation.title: ISBN Resale Automation
isbn-resale-automation.description: A workflow that compares scanned ISBN data across five second-hand book platforms and triggers a sale when conditions are right.

gratis-buecher-abholung.title: Gratis Bücher Abholung
gratis-buecher-abholung.description: Conversion-focused landing page for free book collection in Switzerland — request form, WhatsApp, legal pages. Live on its own domain.

coskuntech.title: CoskunTech
coskuntech.description: Agency site for tradespeople and small businesses in Germany — web, SEO/GEO and automation, trilingual (DE · TR · EN), Next.js.

webhook-monitor.title: Operations Monitoring Dashboard
webhook-monitor.summary: An operations panel that tracks webhook traffic, error states and retry flows live. Makes what's happening in the system visible at a glance.

lead-intake-system.title: Lead Processing System
lead-intake-system.summary: An end-to-end flow that pushes form leads into the CRM, notifies the team and kicks off the follow-up process.

prompt-routing-tool.title: AI Workflow Router
prompt-routing-tool.summary: A smart routing layer that directs incoming requests to the right AI model based on cost, speed and task type.

agent-memory-layer.title: AI Knowledge Layer
agent-memory-layer.summary: A persistent memory system that lets AI assistants remember past conversations. Prevents context loss in long-running dialogues.

internal-ocr-utility.title: Document Processing Tool
internal-ocr-utility.summary: A processing tool that digitizes paper documents and forms and extracts structured data. Eliminates manual data entry.

ai-parsing-sandbox.title: AI Data Extraction Pipeline
ai-parsing-sandbox.summary: A pipeline that extracts structured data from messy documents and emails. Continuously measures and improves extraction accuracy.

contact.heading: Let's build something together.
contact.body: Let's build your product or internal tool together. An idea, a need, or just a hello — drop me a line.

footer.credit_line_1_pre: Inspired by the portfolio language of
footer.credit_line_2: Reinterpreted for web products & AI systems.

impressum.title: Legal Notice (Impressum)
impressum.disclaimer_body: This website is a personal portfolio. Its content has been prepared with care; however, no guarantee is given for its timeliness or accuracy. The operators of linked external sites are solely responsible for their content.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.intro: Personal data is processed on this website only to the extent technically necessary. Below we explain which data is processed and why.
datenschutz.controller_body: The controller is the site owner named in the Legal Notice. For questions: {email}
datenschutz.hosting_body: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc. (USA). When you visit the site, technically necessary data is processed on Vercel's servers and may be transferred to the USA. Vercel processes this data on the basis of the standard contractual clauses.
datenschutz.logs_body: On each visit, the server automatically and temporarily records the following technical data: IP address, date/time, requested page, and browser and operating-system information. This data is processed to keep the site secure and running reliably and is not used to build personal profiles.
datenschutz.contact_body: When you contact us by email ({email}), the information you provide is processed to handle your request. There is no server-side form collecting data on this website.
datenschutz.cookies_body: This website does not use cookies and does not write any tracking data to your browser.
datenschutz.tracking_body: No third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services are used on this website. Fonts are hosted locally on our server; no requests are sent to external services such as Google Fonts.
datenschutz.rights_body: Under applicable data protection law (GDPR / KVKK), you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, and objection. To exercise these rights, contact us at {email}.
datenschutz.changes_body: This statement may be updated where legal requirements or changes to the website make it necessary. The current version is always available on this page.
